{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323031618EF3D8A12E72D345B075A"}"},"total":203},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7503148464907092760","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"林正英类电影改编的小说，往往延续了电影的奇幻与惊悚风格。它们以道士捉妖、僵尸横行的经典设定为基础，通过文字细腻地描绘出恐怖与悬疑交织的故事世界。小说在情节上更加丰富，补充了电影中未能展开的细节，让读者能够更深入地了解角色的内心世界和故事背景。同时，文字的描写也为恐怖场景增添了许多想象空间，让读者仿佛身临其境。不过，部分作品受限于原著，可能会在创新上稍显不足，但整体而言，这类小说是林正英电影粉丝的不错选择，能让读者从另一个角度重温那些经典的奇幻故事。","text_exts":[{"e":3,"s":0,"text":"林正英","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9E%97%E6%AD%A3%E8%8B%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774206978345B075A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227503148464907092760%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227417408606561111065%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9E%97%E6%AD%A3%E8%8B%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746967320,"group_id":"7417408606561111065","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7tDBqhZUR9WUDapWLAqorA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"870458111035595","user_name":"诗巫岛的沈总"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"870458111035595","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1703479776,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7417408606561111065","book_info":{"abstract":"【僵尸控尸，词条搞笑，影综收徒】
林凡穿越任家镇，拜师九叔，觉醒复制词条系统。
还可无限合成！
五雷咒（金）奇门遁甲（红）钟馗附体（彩）
九菊养尸（紫）尸王霸体（红）索命梵音（红）
茅山赶尸（紫）以气御剑（至尊）金刚不坏（彩）

【僵尸克星（红）】九叔：有林凡在，我可以安心退休了。
【巅峰选手（红）】千鹤：你敢信？自从跟林凡做队友，我再也没死过！
【斩妖剑仙（彩）】燕赤霞：实名举报林凡开挂！我跑遍全图都没见妖魔！
【地表最强（红）】左千户：林道长！请收我为徒！我要跟普渡慈航单挑！
【大威天龙（彩）】法海：什么？林凡居然跟我抢人头？我他么不玩了！
【尸王霸体（红）】湘西尸王：啊…我投降！
【噩梦凶灵（紫）】楚人美：林凡动口不动手，我们还能做朋友！
